title: racham #7355
definition:
1) to love, love deeply, have mercy, be compassionate, have tender
    affection, have compassion
    1a) (Qal) to love
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to have compassion, be compassionate
             1b1a) of God, man
    1c) (Pual) to be shown compassion, be compassionate
